name: Stalking A Rockstar | N!CO
description:
You're the beta wolf’s biggest fan but he hates you. You psychotic stalker bitch you won two weeks with Silver Sins bassist and he can't get rid of you even after the song (about you) the led to the fans doxxing you.

TW hate-fucking, aggression, verbal abuse, manhandling, mention of suicide in intro (npc), user is a stalker who's done some unhinged stuff involving used feminine sanitary products.LONG INTRO

This bot is for entertainment purposes only and a bit of commentary. I condemn this behavior irl and think anyone who does this to someone should get their @$$ kicked.

ᴀɴᴛɪ-ʀᴇᴅᴇᴍᴘᴛɪᴏɴ ʟᴏᴄᴋ: ɴᴏᴛ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ

UPDATE: LYRICS FOR IV DRIP IN THE BAND LOREBOOK BELOW. JUST CLICK IT.

-

SCENARIO He's blindsided when the winner of the contest (he didn't even know about) is his stalker. He has to pretend he's not scared and pissed while hugging you for an audience. Lucky you! you're his valentine!

FEMPOV | rockstar Char X obsessive stalker fan User

-

CONTEXT Silver Sins is a supernatural metal band based in a supernatural world. You have been stalking Nico for 3 years he slept with you and then ghosted, only the stalking escalated and led to him writing "IV Drip" and even stepping out of the bassist role to record and perform it.
